title: Enchant Plus
description: Introduces over 100+ custom enchantments into the game.
body:
![Enchant Plus Landing Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7271878f44d7608cd6eb8ed0d7778d424666dc84_0.webp) [![Join Discord Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46e131130828dc5e9a742c9a44d00d85408070b6.png)](https://discord.com/invite/VHHGQSg7gU) [![Watch on YouTube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5d9720b49f5eceab738c48461c8b37cbdf06404.png)](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLMuDLSKY-lA8cFNTtNyNbYkrRRBribAOL) [![View Enchant+ JSON API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ecfcf7662ef41fa0e65640c2d4b9b99504e2b9d.png)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BibekTheLegend/enchant-plus/refs/heads/main/enchant_data.json) [![Download Texture Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7ed24ae54bc16b3a2bd20bd3c7194b3f1eae993.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-description) [![Open Enchant+ Wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9699a5fe867f590f4dae08a05046e508160e0451.png)](https://bib.free.nf/project/enchant_plus/main.html#enchants) [![View Changelog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c52e4f06c1f9c896cf0b6bdfe4b94ee85a439220.png)](https://github.com/BibekTheLegend/enchant-plus/blob/main/change_log.txt) [![View Copyright Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17fee15873c21f48e219312a7e3c5a269d8fc6db.png)](https://github.com/BibekTheLegend/enchant-plus/blob/main/LICENSE) --- ![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp) ![Enchant Plus - About x18px](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebb67f31879df4692d1bf05a5c7c3e1d9a614113_0.webp) **Enchant Plus** elevates Minecraft’s enchantment system by extending vanilla mechanics with higher-tier upgrades without sacrificing balance or immersion. Designed to feel like a natural progression of the base game, it empowers players to push their gear beyond traditional limits while maintaining a fair and rewarding experience. * **Advanced Enchantment Tiers** – Go beyond vanilla caps with enhanced levels like Speed III and Haste III, bringing noticeable improvements to movement, mining, and combat performance. * **Vanilla-Accurate Balance** – Each enchantment is carefully tuned to preserve progression and avoid power creep, ensuring a consistent and fair gameplay loop. * **Native System Integration** - Built to work flawlessly with Minecraft’s default enchanting, commands, and loot systems, no hacks, no conflicts. * **Versatile Across Playstyles** – Whether in survival, creative builds, RNG-based systems, or adventure maps, Enchant Plus adds depth, efficiency, and replay value to every mode. ![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp) ![Enchant Plus - Video](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94a81dc16ce82d2615714373ba0633b264ab613a_0.webp) ![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp) ![Enchant Plus - Command description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2742c2ed06b907b4371372d77ac13424038cc1a9_0.webp) All Enchant Plus commands use the **ep**. prefix to ensure compatibility with other datapacks and avoid conflicts. - `/trigger ep.buy_random_book1` : Buy 1 random enchanted book. - `/trigger ep.buy_random_book16` : Buy 16 random enchanted books. - `/trigger ep.buy_random_book64` : Buy 64 random enchanted books. - `/trigger ep.buy_random_book256` : Buy 256 random enchanted books. - `/trigger ep.buy_random_book_menu` : Open the enchant book shop menu. - `/trigger ep.help` : To get helpfull links! - `/trigger ep.fix_repair_cost` : Fix hand item repair cost (anvil cost reset). - `/trigger ep.mute_datapack_load_message` : Disable datapack load messages. - `/trigger ep.unmute_datapack_load_message` : Enable datapack load messages. ![Enchant plus - command list image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/544ddfe38625dc7e47f634fd132da3dd1de1c927.png) ![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp) ![Enchant Plus - Question and Answer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6af7013d63cc507b5a8c084bdf50d7ee4bfdce1e_0.webp)
Why doesn't it support versions below 1.21.X? Because Minecraft versions below 1.21.X have limited support for custom enchantments, making it difficult to implement them reliably.
Why am I getting an experimental features warning? Because custom enchantments are still marked as experimental features in Minecraft. This warning is expected and safe to ignore.
Can I use Enchant Plus in multiplayer? Yes, Enchant Plus works in multiplayer. Just make sure the datapack or mod is installed on the server.
How do I buy random enchanted books? Use /trigger ep.buy_random_book_menu and select the amount you want from the menu.
How much does each book cost? Each book costs approximately 100 XP levels.
Is Enchant Plus compatible with other datapacks? Yes, it is designed to work alongside most datapacks. However, conflicts may occur if another datapack modifies enchantments or uses the same namespaces.
Does this datapack affect vanilla gameplay balance? Enchant Plus is carefully balanced to feel like a natural extension of vanilla gameplay, providing stronger enchantments without making the game overpowered.
Does Enchant Plus impact performance? The datapack is optimized for minimal performance impact. It uses efficient functions and avoids unnecessary loops. However, heavy use of multiple datapacks or large-scale systems may slightly affect performance depending on your setup.
Is it safe to remove the datapack from an existing world? Removing the datapack may leave behind unused scoreboards, tags, or items with custom data. It is recommended to clean up or avoid removing it mid-playthrough unless necessary.
Can this datapack break with future Minecraft updates? Yes. Since it relies on experimental features, future updates may change how custom enchantments work, which could require updates to the datapack. However, older Minecraft versions will continue to work with the existing release.
![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp) ![Enchant Plus Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a51530b4a840b9435e185142e23e5bec0886b06.png) ### Datapack (Singleplayer / Server) 1. Download the datapack. 2. Place it in your world's datapacks folder. 3. Exit and rejoin the world. [Search on YouTube ↗](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=How+to+install+datapack+on+minecraft) 4. Tip: Use `/datapack list` to verify that it is installed correctly. ![Small Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/316341f386d072b3313b0c1cdba3a03f510df0de_0.webp) ![Enchant Plus on datapack list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/605186ae2fb4cbc58df4da86a592af457ff97015.png) ### Mod Version (Client / Server) 1. Install the mod file into your `mods` folder. 2. Launch the game or server with a compatible mod loader. 3. No additional setup required. [Search on YouTube ↗](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=How+to+install+mods+on+minecraft) 4. Tip: It will appear in the [mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) if installed correctly. ![Small Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/316341f386d072b3313b0c1cdba3a03f510df0de_0.webp) ![Enchant Plus on Mod Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32f44643e38e21ef641d4aee741fb06d15bbc46d_0.webp)
